description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from fastrack is a must have for those who love organising their wallet space. Dimensions : 28 cm x 15 cm Crafted from genuine leather, has a three fold with a press button closure Two main compartments Two insert pockets with nine card slots and one id card slot One zippered pocket at the back Red stitch detailing and brand name on the top Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
